description: Simple, functional, plus in-vogue - the perfect sandal for the stylish teen in town. Crafted from genuine leather and styled to capture the season's trends, get this pair before stocks run out! Upper Leather forefoot and midfoot straps Straps at the heel to act as a heel cup Two straps looping around the ankle with buckle closures Soft footbed Outsole Durable and textured with an upraised heel Sandal care Clean the upper using a suede brush Do not store in direct sunlight
